center.name: Madagascar subhumid forests
center.summary: Madagascar subhumid forests是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Rufous-headed ground roller，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The rufous-headed ground roller is endemic to eastern Madagascar where it is found in montane evergreen rain forests at altitudes between , but is most common between
